task_completion.description: The agent opened the Google Earth Pro Options or Preferences menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'Google Earth Options' (Windows/Linux) or 'Preferences' (Mac) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent selected the Universal Transverse Mercator setting in the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Options/Preferences dialog, under the '3D View' tab and 'Show Lat/Long' section, the radio button for 'Universal Transverse Mercator' is checked.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the specific UTM coordinates into the search field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search sidebar (top left) contains the text '13T 534350mE 4940750mN' (or a close variation like '534350 4940750') in the input field.

task_completion.description: The main viewport displays the Devils Tower National Monument.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D map view shows the distinctive Devils Tower rock formation (a large, flat-topped igneous intrusion standing vertically above the surrounding terrain).

task_completion.description: The status bar displays coordinates in UTM format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status bar at the bottom of the Google Earth window displays coordinates starting with the zone '13 T', followed by Easting ('m E') and Northing ('m N') values, instead of Degrees/Minutes/Seconds.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Google Earth Pro desktop application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the full Google Earth Pro interface (sidebar, toolbar, 3D viewer, status bar), not a web browser (Google Earth Web) or a static image.

integrity.description: The agent did not simulate the output using a text editor or terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual context is a 3D rendering application, not a code editor, terminal window, or notepad displaying the coordinates.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's search or navigation features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Search' panel in the sidebar is visible and active, or the camera view is updating, indicating genuine navigation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Devils Tower National Monument (Visual: distinctive flat-topped rock tower). Target UTM Coordinates: 13T 534350mE 4940750mN. Correct Configuration Visual: The status bar must show '13 T' (Zone) along with 'm E' and 'm N' labels. If the status bar shows degrees (°), minutes ('), or seconds ("), the task is incomplete.
